lead_profile_text: STL Switch — existing LTL property in Chiswick/West London converting to STL. LTL tenancy status not explicitly stated at meeting.
delay_trigger_phrases: existing long-let property converting to STL

top_objections.text: Local presence and coverage for Chiswick/West London area
top_objections.zac_response: Local presence and coverage confirmed for the area

top_questions.text: What is the income estimate for short letting?
top_questions.answer: Income estimates presented and compared to current long-let return

top_questions.text: What are the fees and platform commissions?
top_questions.answer: Full fee structure covering platform and management commissions explained

what_moved_them: Income projections vs current LTL return

conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Obtain mortgage, STL and LTL figures for this property

conversion_gaps.gap: Existing tenancy may need to end before STL conversion
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Confirm tenant notice/end date and build onboarding timeline
